name: Freesoil Senior Center
description: Freesoil Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Free Soil, MI. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Closed for the summer season.  Players travel to Manistee Township courts May-October.

name: Ludington Area Pickleball Club at West Shore Community College
description: Ludington Area Pickleball Club at West Shore Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Scottville, MI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Oriole Field
description: Oriole Field is a place to play pickleball in Ludington, MI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: St. John's Lutheran Church
description: St. John's Lutheran Church is a place to play pickleball in Ludington, MI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.
